title: Advancements and challenges in bioinformatics tools for microbial genomics in the last decade
source: Houmenou et al., Infection, Genetics and Evolution, 2025

L2: Bioinformatics tools have transformed microbial genomics from sample preparation through genome assembly and annotation
Smart integration of digital resources and emerging technologies advances complex biological data analysis
L3: Comprehensive review of bioinformatics tool advancements for microbial genomics over the past decade, covering next-generation sequencing pipelines, genome assembly, functional annotation, and the integration of AI with traditional computational approaches
